conversation.text: hey albert, my mate dave told me about you guys
Hey, yeah Dave's a good one. Was this for your recruitment firm?
yeah we get a ton of inbound from linkedin and job boards, need something to handle the first touch faster
How fast are you getting back to people at the moment?
honestly not fast enough, our consultants are slammed during the day and evenings nothing happens
Yeah with recruitment that first response basically decides who gets the candidate. Sounds like you already know what the gap is
yeah exactly, can we just jump on a call?

Course. Louis is the founder, he runs all the strategy calls. He'll scope it out properly for recruitment specifically
https://calendly.com/after5/free-discovery-call
